examples.en: She made a quick sketch of the old bridge.
examples.zh: 她替那座老橋畫了一張快速的素描。

examples.en: He likes to sketch people in the coffee shop.
examples.zh: 他喜歡在咖啡店裡速寫來往的人。

img: pencil sketch of a bridge in a notebook

examples.en: The artist stretched a blank canvas over the frame.
examples.zh: 畫家把空白畫布繃在畫框上。

examples.en: Bright colors covered the whole canvas.
examples.zh: 鮮豔的色彩鋪滿了整張畫布。

img: blank white canvas on a wooden easel

examples.en: She mixed blue and yellow on her palette.
examples.zh: 她在調色盤上把藍色和黃色調在一起。

examples.en: The room uses a warm color palette.
examples.zh: 這個房間採用暖色調的配色。

img: wooden painter palette with dabs of oil paint

examples.en: His bold brushstrokes make the painting feel alive.
examples.zh: 他大膽的筆觸讓這幅畫顯得生動。

examples.en: You can see every brushstroke up close.
examples.zh: 近看時你能看見每一道筆觸。

img: close-up of thick oil paint brushstrokes

examples.en: The museum displays a portrait of the young queen.
examples.zh: 博物館展出一幅年輕女王的肖像。

examples.en: He painted a portrait of his grandmother.
examples.zh: 他為祖母畫了一幅肖像。

img: framed oil portrait of a woman on gallery wall

examples.en: She sells landscape paintings of the countryside.
examples.zh: 她販售鄉間風景的油畫。

examples.en: The photographer loves wide landscape shots.
examples.zh: 這位攝影師喜歡寬闊的風景照。

img: painting of rolling green hills and sky

examples.en: This wall needs a lighter shade of green.
examples.zh: 這面牆需要淺一點的綠色。

examples.en: He shaded the drawing to add depth.
examples.zh: 他為畫上陰影以增加立體感。

img: color chart showing shades of green

examples.en: The photo has a soft, warm tone.
examples.zh: 這張照片帶著柔和的暖色調。

examples.en: Cool tones make the room feel calm.
examples.zh: 冷色調讓房間感覺沉靜。

img: gradient of warm sunset tones

examples.en: The black frame gives a strong contrast to the white wall.
examples.zh: 黑色畫框與白牆形成強烈對比。

examples.en: She used contrast to make the title stand out.
examples.zh: 她用對比讓標題更醒目。

img: black and white high contrast graphic design

examples.en: The rough texture of the paint feels interesting.
examples.zh: 油漆粗糙的質感很有意思。

examples.en: This fabric has a soft texture.
examples.zh: 這塊布料有柔軟的質感。

img: close-up of rough textured painted surface

examples.en: First draw the outline of the cat.
examples.zh: 先畫出貓的輪廓。

examples.en: The dark outline makes the shape clear.
examples.zh: 深色的輪廓讓形狀更清楚。

img: simple black outline drawing of a cat

examples.en: The magazine layout is clean and modern.
examples.zh: 這本雜誌的版面乾淨又現代。

examples.en: They changed the layout of the poster.
examples.zh: 他們更改了海報的版面配置。

img: magazine page layout with text and images

examples.en: The wallpaper has a floral pattern.
examples.zh: 壁紙上有花卉圖案。

examples.en: She designed a bold striped pattern.
examples.zh: 她設計了大膽的條紋圖案。

img: colorful repeating geometric pattern

examples.en: The art exhibition opens next Friday.
examples.zh: 這場藝術展覽下週五開幕。

examples.en: Thousands visited the photography exhibition.
examples.zh: 數千人參觀了這場攝影展。

img: people walking through an art exhibition hall

examples.en: We spent the afternoon at the modern art gallery.
examples.zh: 我們整個下午都待在現代美術館。

examples.en: Her paintings hang in a small gallery downtown.
examples.zh: 她的畫作掛在市中心一間小畫廊裡。

img: bright art gallery with framed paintings

examples.en: This painting is considered a masterpiece.
examples.zh: 這幅畫被視為一件傑作。

examples.en: The film is his greatest masterpiece.
examples.zh: 這部電影是他最偉大的傑作。

img: famous classical painting in ornate gold frame

examples.en: A marble sculpture stands in the park.
examples.zh: 公園裡矗立著一座大理石雕塑。

examples.en: The sculpture took the artist two years to finish.
examples.zh: 這件雕塑花了藝術家兩年才完成。

img: white marble sculpture in a plaza

examples.en: I don't always understand abstract art.
examples.zh: 我不見得看得懂抽象藝術。

examples.en: The painting is full of abstract shapes.
examples.zh: 這幅畫充滿了抽象的形狀。

img: abstract painting with bold colorful shapes

examples.en: Her painting style is soft and dreamy.
examples.zh: 她的繪畫風格柔和又夢幻。

examples.en: The building has a classic style.
examples.zh: 這棟建築有著古典風格。

img: two paintings side by side in different styles

examples.en: The logo design looks simple but clever.
examples.zh: 這個標誌設計看似簡單卻很巧妙。

examples.en: She designs covers for books.
examples.zh: 她為書籍設計封面。

img: designer sketching a logo on a tablet

examples.en: She has a very creative mind.
examples.zh: 她的頭腦非常有創意。

examples.en: This is a creative way to use old paper.
examples.zh: 這是利用舊紙張的創意方法。

img: colorful creative workspace with art supplies

examples.en: Art class encourages children's creativity.
examples.zh: 美術課鼓勵孩子的創造力。

examples.en: The project shows her amazing creativity.
examples.zh: 這個作品展現了她驚人的創造力。

img: lightbulb made of colorful paint splashes

examples.en: Students displayed their artwork in the hall.
examples.zh: 學生們在大廳展出他們的藝術作品。

examples.en: This artwork was made from recycled metal.
examples.zh: 這件藝術作品是用回收金屬做成的。

img: student artwork displayed on a school wall

examples.en: The children's book has lovely illustrations.
examples.zh: 這本童書有可愛的插畫。

examples.en: She draws illustrations for magazines.
examples.zh: 她為雜誌畫插圖。

img: colorful hand-drawn children's book illustration

examples.en: The tree casts a long shadow on the wall.
examples.zh: 那棵樹在牆上投下長長的影子。

examples.en: Adding shadows makes the drawing look real.
examples.zh: 加上陰影能讓畫看起來更真實。

img: drawing of a ball with soft shadow underneath

examples.en: She put the photo in a wooden frame.
examples.zh: 她把照片放進木製畫框。

examples.en: The window framed a lovely view.
examples.zh: 那扇窗框住了一幅美麗的景色。

img: empty wooden picture frame on a wall

examples.en: The artist added white highlights to the eyes.
examples.zh: 畫家在眼睛加上白色亮部。

examples.en: Bright colors highlight the main figure.
examples.zh: 鮮豔的顏色突顯出主要人物。

img: portrait sketch with bright white highlights

examples.en: The painting uses vivid red and orange.
examples.zh: 這幅畫用了鮮明的紅色與橙色。

examples.en: She has vivid memories of that summer.
examples.zh: 她對那個夏天有著生動的記憶。

img: painting bursting with vivid bright colors

examples.en: The old poster looks faded and pale.
examples.zh: 這張舊海報看起來褪色又暗淡。

examples.en: She likes the faded colors of vintage photos.
examples.zh: 她喜歡復古照片那種褪色的色調。

img: faded vintage poster with pale colors

examples.en: The drawing shows amazing detail.
examples.zh: 這幅畫展現了驚人的細節。

examples.en: Pay attention to small details in the design.
examples.zh: 設計時要注意微小的細節。

img: close-up of fine detailed pen drawing

examples.en: She carefully composed the photo before shooting.
examples.zh: 她在拍攝前仔細構圖。

examples.en: He composed a beautiful piece of music.
examples.zh: 他創作了一首優美的樂曲。

img: photographer composing a shot through camera

examples.en: The composition of this painting feels balanced.
examples.zh: 這幅畫的構圖顯得很平衡。

examples.en: Good composition guides the viewer's eye.
examples.zh: 好的構圖能引導觀者的視線。

img: diagram showing balanced photo composition grid

examples.en: The sunset inspired her to paint.
examples.zh: 那片夕陽激發她提筆作畫。

examples.en: His work inspires young artists.
examples.zh: 他的作品啟發了年輕藝術家。

img: artist gazing at a sunset for inspiration

examples.en: She found inspiration in nature.
examples.zh: 她從大自然中找到靈感。

examples.en: Travel gives him a lot of inspiration.
examples.zh: 旅行帶給他許多靈感。

img: mood board with photos and color swatches

examples.en: The gallery focuses on modern art.
examples.zh: 這間畫廊專注於現代藝術。

examples.en: Her house has a clean, modern design.
examples.zh: 她的房子有著簡潔的現代設計。

img: minimalist modern art on a white wall

examples.en: He paints in a traditional Chinese style.
examples.zh: 他以傳統中國風格作畫。

examples.en: The festival keeps many traditional crafts alive.
examples.zh: 這個節慶讓許多傳統工藝得以延續。

img: traditional ink painting of mountains

examples.en: The poster has an elegant, simple look.
examples.zh: 這張海報有著優雅簡約的外觀。

examples.en: She wore an elegant black dress.
examples.zh: 她穿著一件優雅的黑色洋裝。

img: elegant minimalist poster with thin gold lines

examples.en: The paintings are on display until June.
examples.zh: 這些畫作展示到六月。

examples.en: They display their crafts at the market.
examples.zh: 他們在市集陳列自己的手工藝品。

img: art pieces displayed on gallery stands

examples.en: The museum has a large collection of paintings.
examples.zh: 這間博物館收藏了大量畫作。

examples.en: She showed her new collection of designs.
examples.zh: 她展示了自己的新設計系列。

img: wall covered with a collection of framed art

examples.en: The market is full of vibrant colors.
examples.zh: 市集裡充滿鮮豔的色彩。

examples.en: She painted the wall a vibrant pink.
examples.zh: 她把牆漆成鮮豔的粉紅色。

img: vibrant colorful street mural

examples.en: Blend the two colors for a soft look.
examples.zh: 把兩種顏色調和以呈現柔和效果。

examples.en: The design blends old and new styles.
examples.zh: 這個設計融合了新舊風格。

img: two paint colors blending smoothly together

examples.en: She hung a canvas print of the ocean.
examples.zh: 她掛上一幅海洋的帆布印刷畫。

examples.en: Canvas prints are cheaper than originals.
examples.zh: 帆布印刷畫比原作便宜。

img: canvas print of ocean waves on living room wall

examples.en: She sells handmade crafts online.
examples.zh: 她在網路上販售手工藝品。

examples.en: The vase was crafted from clay.
examples.zh: 這只花瓶是用黏土手工製成的。

img: handmade clay pottery crafts on a shelf

examples.en: A colorful mural covers the school wall.
examples.zh: 一幅彩色壁畫覆蓋了學校的牆面。

examples.en: Local artists painted the giant mural.
examples.zh: 當地藝術家繪製了這幅巨大的壁畫。

img: large colorful mural on a city building wall

examples.en: The new logo uses a simple blue shape.
examples.zh: 新標誌採用簡單的藍色圖形。

examples.en: A good logo is easy to remember.
examples.zh: 好的標誌容易讓人記住。

img: clean minimalist blue brand logo design

examples.en: This font looks friendly and round.
examples.zh: 這款字體看起來友善又圓潤。

examples.en: Choose a clear font for the poster.
examples.zh: 為海報選一個清楚的字體。

img: typography samples of different fonts

examples.en: The heart is a symbol of love.
examples.zh: 愛心是愛的象徵。

examples.en: Each color in the design has a symbol meaning.
examples.zh: 設計中每種顏色都有象徵意義。

img: simple graphic symbols on colored squares

examples.en: The curator chose fifty works for the show.
examples.zh: 策展人為這場展覽挑選了五十件作品。

examples.en: She works as a curator at the museum.
examples.zh: 她在博物館擔任策展人。

img: curator arranging paintings in a gallery

examples.en: The café has a calm, natural aesthetic.
examples.zh: 這間咖啡館有著平靜的自然美感。

examples.en: Her designs follow a clean aesthetic.
examples.zh: 她的設計走簡潔的美學風格。

img: minimalist aesthetic interior with neutral tones
